name: whatsapp_schedule
description: Schedule WhatsApp messages with AI-parsed natural language
author: CupBots
intent: Send a WhatsApp message to a specific person or group at a scheduled time
not_intent: Creating calendar events, meetings, or appointments

marketplace.tagline: Schedule WhatsApp messages with natural language timing
marketplace.long_description: Type who, what, and when in plain English and the bot handles the rest. Schedule messages to any contact or group using AI-parsed time expressions. List and cancel pending messages anytime.
